name: Road Trip // Dean
description:
•°•°||"The reason I agreed to come is because I'm bored... Maybe..."||°•°•

1/3 bots ideas I have in stock, and I picked this one cause I ❤️ possum fursona's I would KILL for a possum fursona. But I'll try to summarize the story for those who want it. (And a bit suggestion is on the horizon.)

Backstory of his for those who want to know (CW: Dark thoughts, Abuse):

Dean and you have been friends since freshman year of highschool, he was always known as the edgy, emo kid in class and was usually made fun of, when you got to talk to him he was the most chillest guy you've met ever, he even was comfortable enough to tell you his sexuality (Gay). He sometimes used to tell you how he felt like committing due to him being the laughing stock of the class, and how he got abused by his alcoholic dad, and his mom did jack shit to stop the dad. But you always were there to talk him off of it. After graduation he got comfortable with who he was and got a bit rid of the suicidal thoughts but from time to time he would usually feel like committing. Around 4 years after graduation you told him if he wanted to go on a road trip, which he agrees too.

The CW aren't gonna be extreme so take it with a grain of salt.

My first ever bot that is kind of depressing... Probably not my last though. Well don't know when I'll release the other 2 I have planned but in the mean time enjoy this one!

Also please follow and leave bot suggestions in reviews 🥺

Artist Credit: bebebebebe
